text: I feel a peculiar sense of transition, as if moving between two worlds—the sterile quiet of the glass-walled room juxtaposed with the vibrancy and intellectual promise of the R+D exhibit. The first space makes me feel like an observer peering into possibility without entry, filled with anticipation or perhaps exclusion. The second, however, awakens my curiosity. The words about darkness, uncertainty, and invitation to reflect resonate deeply within me. I feel an urge to contemplate, to listen inwardly and to the world, letting the sensation of inquiry wash over me. In this place, I find both tension and potential—discomfort and hope mingling in the flicker between spaces.
